title: centunculus pentandrus var. compactus
intro: Centunculus pentandrus var. compactus, also known as the compact self-heal or small self-heal, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) with a compact and low-growing habit. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Centunculus pentandrus var. compactus include its potential to promote wound healing, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture by steeping the leaves in hot water or ethanol, respectively, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
